meaning: n.少量,轻拍,比目鱼,熟手v.轻拍,轻擦,轻敷,涂
examples: He's in hospital again. Poor dab.
She's a dab hand with a paintbrush.
He's a dab hand at cooking spaghetti.
That, of course, will put us smack-dab in the middle of a presidential election.
Use as a lip gloss, then smear a dab on your cheekbones for a healthy glow.
